data.title: Del Webb Carolina Overlook introduces 20,000 sq ft clubhouse, new villa collection in Raleigh area.
data.description: In Clayton, North Carolina, Del Webb Carolina Overlook is making waves in the active adult living market. The prestigious Lakeview Manor clubhouse has officially opened, wowing residents and visitors alike. Additionally, the long-awaited villa collection has been launched, offering luxurious living options. This lakeside community is grabbing attention with a range of celebratory events scheduled for July. Situated in Wake and Johnston Counties, the community has become the go-to spot for active adults looking for a vibrant lifestyle. The impressive Lakeview Manor spans an impressive 20,000 square feet, providing top-notch amenities and facilities.

data.title: DiaMedica Therapeutics reports positive Phase 2 results for preeclampsia with significant blood pressure reductions and no placental transfer. ($DMAC)
data.description: In Minneapolis, DiaMedica Therapeutics Inc. shared encouraging interim results from Part 1a of the Phase 2 trial of DM199 aimed at treating preeclampsia. The study hit predetermined safety and efficacy targets for the Part 1a dose escalation phase, highlighting the promise of DM199. DM199, also known as rinvecalinase alfa, is a synthetic version of the KLK1 protein. This development underscores the potential for DM199 as a treatment for preeclampsia. The company's stock is listed as Nasdaq: DMAC.

data.title: Golden Valley Memorial Healthcare named to Becker's 2025 List of Great Community Hospitals, recognizing its patient-centered care.
data.description: In Clinton, Missouri, Golden Valley Memorial Healthcare (GVMH) has been chosen for the 2025 edition of Becker’s Hospital Review’s “Great Community Hospitals” list, recognizing their dedication to providing outstanding care and innovative health services in the region. This national acknowledgment showcases GVMH's commitment to delivering patient-centered healthcare. Community hospitals such as GVMH play a crucial role in America's healthcare infrastructure, guaranteeing residents in rural and suburban areas have access to essential medical services.

data.title: BWXT secures $2.6B contracts for naval nuclear reactor components to be delivered over next 6-8 years.
data.description: In Lynchburg, Virginia, BWX Technologies, Inc. (NYSE: BWXT) revealed that it has secured contracts from the U.S. Naval Nuclear Propulsion Program worth about $2.6 billion, encompassing potential options for future years. These contracts involve the production of components for naval nuclear reactors. The focus will be on aiding Virginia and Columbia-class submarines, alongside contributing to specific components for Ford-class aircraft carriers. Deliveries of the contracted products are slated over the next six to eight years.

data.title: 2025 Mercedes-AMG® C 43 Sedan unveiled at Mercedes-Benz of Scottsdale, offering advanced features for enthusiasts.
data.description: Mercedes-Benz of Scottsdale presents a wide range of options and thorough information on the 2025 Mercedes-AMG® C 43 Sedan, a luxurious and high-performance vehicle for car enthusiasts. Located in Scottsdale, Arizona, the dealership offers a blend of power and technology in this model. The 2025 Mercedes-AMG® C 43 Sedan is designed to cater to drivers seeking a mix of performance and luxury.

data.title: Purcell & Lefkowitz LLP investigating REX American Resources (NYSE: REX) for possible shareholder breaches.
data.description: On July 17, 2025, Purcell & Lefkowitz LLP disclosed an ongoing investigation into REX American Resources Corporation (NYSE: REX) aimed at safeguarding the interests of the company's shareholders. The inquiry focuses on assessing potential breaches by REX American Resources Corporation's directors.

data.title: Capital Laser Hair Removal marks 24 years as top laser hair removal provider in D.C. with global clientele and bright future.
data.description: A clinic in Arlington is marking 24 years of operation as a top spot for laser hair removal in the Washington, D.C. metro area. Capital Laser Hair Removal has gained a reputation for excellence, serving clients from around the world. With a bold vision for the future, the clinic aims to continue providing exceptional services to its clientele.

data.title: Investors skeptical of Trump's threats to Powell as tension rises. Markets unfazed, but Wall Street showing more worry.
data.description: The Federal Reserve chair has drawn increasing hostility from President Trump. While markets remain unconcerned at this point, there is growing unease among some individuals in the financial sector on Wall Street.
WARSH: TRUMP IS RIGHT TO BE PUSHING FED PUBLICLY

data.title: SEC delays decision on in-kind redemptions for Bitwise crypto ETFs on NYSE Arca, deadline extended.
data.description: The decision deadline for Bitwise's spot Bitcoin and Ether ETFs on NYSE Arca, regarding in-kind redemptions, has been extended by the US SEC. The new deadline will allow more time for the consideration of this proposal by authorities.

data.title: Royalty Pharma appoints Carole Ho and Elizabeth Weatherman to Board of Directors. Carole Ho is CMO at Denali Therapeutics while Elizabeth Weatherman is a Partner at Warburg Pincus LLC.
data.description: On July 17, 2025, Royalty Pharma plc (Nasdaq: RPRX) appointed Carole Ho and Elizabeth (Bess) Weatherman to its Board of Directors. Carole Ho, current Chief Medical Officer and Head of Development at Denali Therapeutics, specializing in neurodegenerative diseases, brings her expertise to the board. Bess Weatherman, a Special Limited Partner at Warburg Pincus LLC, a prominent global private equity firm focusing on growth investments, also joins the board. Their appointments are effective immediately, expanding the board's diversity and adding valuable perspectives from successful leaders in the biopharmaceutical and private equity sectors.

data.title: Terry Shaw, ex-AdventHealth President, joins Clearsense Board. Aims to fuel healthcare innovation.
data.description: A highly experienced veteran in healthcare leadership has joined Clearsense, bringing forth 40 years of expertise. The aim is to assist healthcare organizations in leveraging data revitalization to achieve cost savings and foster innovation. The individual is based in Nashville, Tennessee, with the appointment taking place on July 17, 2025. Clearsense is a cloud-based platform focused on data enablement.

data.title: EMCOR Group, Inc. (NYSE: EME) to release Q2 2025 results on July 31, 2025, followed by webcast at 10:30am EDT.
data.description: EMCOR Group, Inc. stated it will unveil its financial performance report for the second quarter which concluded on June 30, 2025, on Thursday, July 31, 2025, before the market opens. Following this disclosure, the firm will conduct an earnings conference call and webcast to discuss these results and its activities on the same day at 10:30 am EDT. Tony Guzzi, Chairman, President, and CEO, along with Jason N, will lead the call. EMCOR Group, Inc. is listed under NYSE with the code EME.

data.title: MasTec plans to share Q2 2025 results on Jul 31 after market close, with a webcast on Aug 1 at 9:00 a.m. ET.
data.description: MasTec, Inc. (NYSE: MTZ) is set to announce its second quarter financial outcomes on Thursday, July 31, 2025, post-market closure. Senior management will conduct a webcast to analyze these results on Friday, August 1, 2025, at 9:00 a.m. ET. The live broadcast will be available via the MasTec Investor Relations site at www.mastec.com/investors/. For those unable to attend, a replay link, the earnings report, and related materials will be accessible.

data.title: ExaGrid recognized on 2025 MES Midmarket 100 list for IT solutions, includes Tiered Backup Storage with Retention Time-Lock and non-network-facing tier.
data.description: In Marlborough, Massachusetts, ExaGrid® unveiled that its Tiered Backup Storage system, featuring Retention Time-Lock and a non-network-facing tier for enhanced security known as a tiered air gap, has been recognized by MES Computing as one of the top technology providers for midmarket organizations. This distinction was awarded as part of the 2025 MES Midmarket 100 list, which celebrates companies with expertise in catering to the specific IT requirements of midsize enterprises. ExaGrid's innovative solution also offers delayed deletes and immutability to bolster ransomware recovery efforts.

data.title: Enlightify Inc. invests $20M in Cyber Token, showing commitment to Web3 infrastructure and blockchain technology.
data.description: In Xi'an, China, on July 17, 2025, Enlightify Inc. (NYSE: ENFY) revealed a significant move by investing as much as $20 million in Cyber. Cyber is known for its prominent blockchain ecosystem that focuses on decentralized AI and social infrastructure.
